{{Quote|Some time ago, we established an archaeological station on the dead planet, Alashan. There were theories that a great civilization once flourished there. Some of our scientists believed that elements of its science, its technology might have survived through the millennia.|[[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]]|<ref name="World of Fire!">{{StoryCite|story=World of Fire!|book=Star Wars Weekly 107}}</ref>}}
An '''unidentified culture''' was the ancient civilization [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alashan]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. The culture had reached technological sophistication at a time well before the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was [[25,000 BBY|founded]]. Among their accomplishments was the creation of a power source that was able to power the entirety of their massive [[Unidentified Alashan city|underground city]].

The power was also the source behind the [[Sentinel (creature)|Guardian of Forever]], a powerful energy being designed to protect the city. Among other powers, the creature was able to fire a [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] using the power of the city's [[Alashan control center|control center]] which could destroy a target a hundred thousand kilometers from the planet's surface.

By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], they had completely disappeared. Leaving the gigantic city of Alashan as the only monument to their existence, they sealed the city from the outside.
